/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/src/calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/src/Token_stream.cpp.o -o calculator
